seoTitle: How to Find Previous Online Returns in TurboTax Canada
metaDescription: See how to locate past online tax returns in TurboTax Canada, useful for checking filing history, preparing for audits, or reviewing prior years.
intro: Whether you need to confirm what you filed last year or pull up records for an audit, TurboTax Canada keeps your previous online returns accessible if you know where to look. This guide covers navigating to your return history, opening past filings, and organizing them for future reference. It's aimed at both first-time users trying to find an old return and business owners who want quick access to historical tax data.

steps.heading: Navigate to your TurboTax Canada account
steps.body: Sign in to the account you used to file previously, since past online returns are tied to that specific TurboTax Canada login.

steps.heading: Find the previous returns section
steps.body: Look for the area of the platform that lists your filing history by tax year, where each past return should be listed separately.

steps.heading: Access and review a specific return
steps.body: Select the tax year you need to open the full return, letting you review the figures and forms you submitted that year.

steps.heading: Organize past returns for easy reference
steps.body: Once you've located your returns, consider noting which years you may need again soon, such as for a mortgage application or audit preparation.

steps.heading: Use historical data for better planning
steps.body: Reviewing prior returns can help you compare year-over-year changes in income or deductions, which is useful for financial and tax strategy planning.

faq.question: Can I access returns from several years ago in TurboTax Canada?
faq.answer: TurboTax Canada typically retains online returns tied to your account across multiple past years, though exact retention periods can vary.

faq.question: What if I used a different email to file in a previous year?
faq.answer: If you signed in with a different account, you may need to sign in with those original credentials to find that year's return.

faq.question: Do I need my past return for this year's audit preparation?
faq.answer: Having access to prior returns is helpful for audit preparation since it lets you confirm what was reported in earlier years.

faq.question: Is there a fee to view previous online returns?
faq.answer: Viewing returns you already filed through TurboTax Canada is generally accessible without an added charge.

faq.question: Can a business use this feature to track historical filings?
faq.answer: Yes, business owners can use this feature to keep a record of past filings for financial planning and tax strategy purposes.
